rationale: Abstract Y articulates a specific, falsifiable knowledge gap, uses a properly structured JICE format with an explicit Objective section, and calibrates its conclusion with appropriate hedging, whereas Abstract X lacks a defined gap and slightly overclaims predictive value without multivariable effect estimates.
loser_weakness: Abstract X lacked a clearly stated knowledge gap and used no structured Objective section, weakening both scientific framing and journal-format fit.
